payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD JOINT COMMITTEE MEETING
payload.description: Long Island Rail Road Joint Committee meeting presentation on East Side Access support projects, including Jamaica Capacity Improvements, Massapequa Pocket Track, Great Neck Pocket Track & Colonial Road Bridge, Mid-Suffolk Yard, and Port Washington Yard Track Extensions.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: Jamaica Capacity Improvements - Phase 1
tool_args.raw_text: Jamaica Capacity Improvements - Phase 1 - Beneficial Use - $321.6 Mil.

payload.description: Stage 1: Platform F & associated station tracks - In-Service November 2021 (ESA Support). Stage 2: Universal Outlying Crossovers (Not ESA Support Effort) - MET Interlocking Final Cutover October 2021, Beaver Interlocking Final Cutover August 2022, Union Crossover Track Infrastructure January 2023.

tool_args.label: Massapequa Pocket Track
tool_args.raw_text: Massapequa Pocket Track - Beneficial Use - $19.6 Mil.

payload.description: Signal system cutover: March 2020 (Actual). Pocket Track In-Service Commissioning: June 2021 (Actual). Closeout: November 2021 (Actual).

tool_args.label: Great Neck Pocket Track & Colonial Road Bridge
tool_args.raw_text: Great Neck Pocket Track & Colonial Road Bridge - Beneficial Use - $45.0 Mil.

payload.project_name: Great Neck Pocket Track & Colonial Road Bridge
payload.description: Colonial Road Bridge - Bridge Construction Complete: August 2016 (Actual), Bridge placed in service: May 2016 (Actual). Great Neck Pocket Track - Neck 3 (crossover): June 2022 (Actual), Neck 2 (crossover): December 2, 2022 (Actual), Signal Cutover: December 2, 2022 (Actual), Commissioning: December 2, 2022 (Actual).
New yard support facility completion: March 2020 (Actual). Yard and supporting infrastructure completion: October 2020 (Actual). Closeout: December 2022 (Actual).

tool_args.label: Port Washington Yard Track Extensions
tool_args.raw_text: Port Washington Yard Track Extensions - Planning - $3.0 Mil.

payload.description: Options for Yard Track extensions are severely limited due to extensive parking in the vicinity of the station. Advancement of this project is contingent upon the MTA LIRR reaching an agreement with the Town of North Hempstead for real estate acquisition and funding availability.
